title: Yaarukkum Sollama Lyrics All In All Azhaguraja Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Yaarukkum Sollama
Singer(s): Rahul Nambiyar, Chorus
Movie: All In All Azhagu Raja
Music: Thamman S
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar

Yaarukkum Sollama,
un nenjukulla idam pidichen, unnaala thannaala
karanam illaama
un kannukulla sikki thavichen, munnaala pinnaala
manasukulla chellam vellam
konjam enna kavuthuputta mella saachiputta
thangam chellam vellam
hayyo enna thavikka vitta
nenja thudikkavitta
Yaaro nee yaaro pera sollidathaaney
kittathatta konnuputta

ye thottu thottu thottu
un nenja thottu thottu
indha kadhalum vandhu unnai otti ottikondhaa

vittu vittu vittu oru kaaichal vaithu vittu
indha kadhalin vetpam unnai
suttu suttu sendradhaa ..(Yaarukkum Sollama)

Un azhaga paathu manasa paathu
mayangi ponen naaney
adi kizhaka paarthu merka paarthu
thaniyaa nineney..
Un azhaga paathu manasa paathu
mayangi ponen naaney

Alaillaa kadala pola asayaama ninneney
karamela unna paarthu
dhesai maari vandheney
ennakulla enna thaedi
pudhusaaga pirandhenaa
yaaro nee yaaro un pera sollidathaaney
kittathatta konnuputta

Adi valayapatti thavilu saththam
manasukulla ketten, adhu
anga thatti inga thaati aatampodadhey
Adi valayapatti thavilu saththam
manasukulla ketten,
Mazha paenja tharaya pola
pudhu vaasam thandhaaye
puriyaadha vasam indha pen vaasam endraaye
thadaiyillaa minsaaram pol
dhinamdhorum vandhaaye
yaaro nee yaaro un pera sollidathaaney
kittathatta konnuputta

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Yaarukkum Sollama expresses deep romantic feelings and the joy of love, highlighting the emotional connection between partners.

What is the plot context of the movie?

All In All Azhagu Raja revolves around comedy and romance, showcasing the protagonist's humorous journey in love.

Who is the singer and music director?

The song is sung by Rahul Nambiar and composed by Thaman S, known for their vibrant collaborations in Tamil cinema.

When was the song released?

Yaarukkum Sollama was released on October 24, 2013, as part of the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaarukkum Sollama, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions towards his beloved, encapsulating the essence of love and affection. The song's upbeat tempo and romantic lyrics create a joyful atmosphere, making it perfect for celebrations and special occasions. As part of the film All In All Azhagu Raja, it enhances the narrative by showcasing the protagonist's romantic journey. The vibrant music and engaging vocals evoke feelings of happiness and nostalgia, resonating with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Yaarukkum Sollama from the film All In All Azhagu Raja, where Rahul Nambiar's captivating vocals blend seamlessly with Thaman S's infectious beats. This song encapsulates the essence of romance and joy, making it a perfect addition to any celebration. Dive into the melodious charm that has made this track a favorite among fans!
stanzaMeanings: I have found a place in your heart, without any reason, your eyes have captured me. The feelings inside me are like a flood, slowly holding back the precious feelings. Oh, my heart is beating because of you. Who are you? Just say your name and I will get it.
This love has touched your heart, and it has come to you.
Let go, let go, let go, I have set a trap for you. Is this love wrapping around you?
Seeing your beauty, my heart is mesmerized. I have looked at you and thought of you alone.
Like a fish in water, I have come to you without any desire. Who are you? Just say your name and I will get it.

I heard the sound of your heart beating, it echoed in my mind. It’s like a new home that has come with the rain. This girl’s home is like a mystery, and every day it brings something new. Who are you? Just say your name and I will get it.
